title: TypedMark property set (<metadata_directory>/property-sets/<property_set>.yaml)
description: Document shape of one property-set file. Authoritative semantics: collection-model.md. Semantic-layer checks include: file basename equals property_set, and relationship-target resolution against the composed collection. A property set must not declare storage, template, guidance, or any composition reference; additionalProperties: false enforces that here.

allOf.$comment: A property set must not define id; note_type, when declared, must use value_from_schema because a property set has no top-level note_type.
